skinname-citizen:
{{name}}

"Citizen" refers to the name of the video game [[:w:en:Star Citizen|Star Citizen]].
citizen-prefs-talkpage: Link to the Citizen talk page which is shown before the preview link in skin preferences. See T307113 for more information.
citizen-preferences-load-error: Error message shown in the preferences dropdown when the preferences ResourceLoader module fails to load.
citizen-preferences-load-retry:
Label of the retry button shown alongside the preferences load error.
{{Identical|Retry}}
citizen-notifications-title:
Heading of the notification panel that opens from the header notification button.
{{Identical|Notifications}}
citizen-notifications-label:
Accessible label and tooltip for the single header notification button.
{{Identical|Notifications}}
citizen-notifications-tab-all:
Label of the tab in the notification panel that shows both alerts and notices.
{{Identical|All}}
citizen-notifications-tab-alert: Label of the tab in the notification panel that shows alert notifications (mentions, talk messages, etc.).
citizen-notifications-tab-notice: Label of the tab in the notification panel that shows notice notifications (page reviews, watched-page edits, etc.).
citizen-notifications-mark-all-read: Label of the button that marks all notifications in the active tab as read.
citizen-notifications-empty: Message shown in the notification panel when the active tab has no notifications.
citizen-notifications-error: Error message shown in the notification panel when notifications fail to load.
citizen-notifications-retry:
Label of the retry button shown alongside the notification load error.
{{Identical|Retry}}
citizen-notifications-see-all:
Short label of the footer link in the notification panel that opens [[Special:Notifications]].
{{Identical|See all}}
citizen-notifications-preferences: Label of the footer link in the notification panel that opens the notification preferences.
citizen-actions-more-toggle: Tooltip of more page actions menu toggle
citizen-page-info-credits: Label for the article credits message
citizen-page-info-lastmod: Label for the last modified message
citizen-footer-desc: Default text for the site footer decription.
citizen-footer-tagline: Default text for the site footer tagline.
citizen-action-addsection:
Used in the Citizen skin. See for example {{canonicalurl:Talk:Main_Page|useskin=vector}}
{{Identical|Add topic}}. Same as vector-action-addsection in Vector skin.
citizen-jumptotop: Label for link to jump to top of page
citizen-toc-toggle-button-label: Accessible label for the toggle button that expands/collapses a table of contents subsection. $1 is the section heading text.
citizen-search-empty-desc: Helper text in the search suggestion when there are no search query
citizen-search-noresults-title: Title in the search suggestion when there are no search results
citizen-share: Label for button to share the current page
citizen-share-copy-link: Label for button to copy the current URL to the clipboard
citizen-share-copied: Message to notify users that the current URL is copied to the clipboard
citizen-share-copy-short-url: Label for a button in the share panel that fetches a shortened URL from Extension:UrlShortener and writes it to the clipboard.
citizen-share-short-url-copied: Confirmation label shown briefly in the same button after a successful short-URL copy.
citizen-share-short-url-error: Toast notification shown when the share panel fails to fetch a short URL from Extension:UrlShortener (e.g. URL not in the allowed-domains list).
citizen-share-show-qr: Label for a button in the share panel that switches the panel to a focused QR-code view.
citizen-share-qr-title: Heading shown at the top of the QR-code view inside the share panel.
citizen-share-qr-scan-hint: Helper text shown beside the QR code suggesting that the user scan it with another device (e.g. a phone).
citizen-share-qr-error: Error message shown in the QR-code view when fetching the QR code from Extension:UrlShortener fails.
citizen-share-qr-retry: Label on the retry button shown when the QR code fails to load.
citizen-share-back: Accessible label / tooltip for the back-arrow button that returns the share panel from the QR view to the default share view.
citizen-tagline-ns-talk: Tagline for pages in talk namespace
citizen-tagline-ns-project: Tagline for pages in project namespace
citizen-tagline-ns-file: Tagline for pages in file namespace
citizen-tagline-ns-mediawiki: Tagline for pages in MediaWiki namespace
citizen-tagline-ns-template: Tagline for pages in template namespace
citizen-tagline-ns-help: Tagline for pages in help namespace
citizen-tagline-ns-category: Tagline for pages in category namespace
citizen-tagline-user-regdate: Label for registration date in taglines on userpages
citizen-preferences-section-behavior: Label for the behavior section in the preferences panel
citizen-theme-name: Heading label for setting that allows you to change theme.
citizen-theme-name-v4:
Label for the theme preference in the Citizen 4 preferences panel. Replaces {{msg-mw|citizen-theme-name}} once Citizen 4 ships.
{{Identical|Theme}}
citizen-theme-black-label:
Label for the black theme — a dark theme with pure black backgrounds. Shown in the theme picker of the preferences panel.
{{Identical|Black}}
citizen-theme-os-label: Label for automatic theme (which respects any operating system setting).
citizen-feature-autohide-navigation-desc: Description for automatically hide navigation preference.
citizen-feature-autohide-navigation-0-la: Label for turning off automatically hide navigation
citizen-feature-autohide-navigation-1-la: Label for turning on automatically hide navigation
citizen-feature-performance-mode-0-label: Label for turning off performance mode
citizen-feature-performance-mode-1-label: Label for turning on performance mode
citizen-feature-image-dimming-name: Label for image dimming in dark theme.
citizen-feature-image-dimming-0-label: Label for turning off image dimming
citizen-feature-image-dimming-1-label: Label for turning on image dimming
citizen-feature-pure-black-name: Label for pure black mode in dark theme.
citizen-feature-pure-black-description: Description for pure black mode preference.
citizen-feature-pure-black-0-label: Label for turning off pure black mode
citizen-feature-pure-black-1-label: Label for turning on pure black mode
citizen-feature-custom-font-size-small-l: Label for small font size. An adjective that describes "text" ({{msg-mw|Citizen-feature-custom-font-size-name}}).
citizen-feature-custom-font-size-standar: Label for standard font size. An adjective that describes "text" ({{msg-mw|Citizen-feature-custom-font-size-name}})
citizen-feature-custom-font-size-large-l: Label for large font size. An adjective that describes "text" ({{msg-mw|Citizen-feature-custom-font-size-name}}).
citizen-feature-custom-font-size-xlarge-: Label for extra large font size. An adjective that describes "text" ({{msg-mw|Citizen-feature-custom-font-size-name}}).
citizen-feature-custom-width-standard-la: Label for standard page width. An adjective that describes "text" ({{msg-mw|Citizen-feature-custom-width-name}}).
citizen-feature-custom-width-wide-label: Label for wide page width. An adjective that describes "text" ({{msg-mw|Citizen-feature-custom-width-name}}).
citizen-feature-custom-width-full-label: Label for full page width. An adjective that describes "text" ({{msg-mw|Citizen-feature-custom-width-name}}).
citizen-user-info-text-anon: Description in the user menu when user is not logged in.
citizen-user-info-text-anon-temp: Description in the user menu when the user is not logged in and temporary accounts are enabled, so an edit will create a temporary account rather than expose the user's IP address.
citizen-user-info-text-temp: Description in the user menu when user is using a temporary account.
citizen-user-info-edits-label: Label for the edit count in the user info
citizen-user-info-joined-label: Label for the registration date in the user info
citizen-command-palette-action-view: Label for the per-item action button that opens the result's page for reading. Used on category results to provide access to the actual Category: page (since clicking the result drills into it instead of navigating).
citizen-command-palette-back: Aria label for the back button in the command palette header when a mode is active.
citizen-command-palette-heading-recent: Label for the recently searched results in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-heading-related: Label for the related results in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-load-error: Toast notification surfaced via mw.notify when the command palette module fails to load.
citizen-command-palette-keyhint-enter-se: Keyboard hint for the key to select an item in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-keyhint-enter-op: Keyboard hint for the key to open a link in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-keyhint-enter-se: Keyboard hint for the key to perform a search in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-keyhint-navigate: Keyboard hint for the key to navigate in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-keyhint-clear: Keyboard hint for the Escape key when it will clear the current query in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-keyhint-close: Keyboard hint for the Escape key when it will close the command palette
citizen-command-palette-keyhint-exit: Keyboard hint for the key to exit the command palette
citizen-command-palette-keyhint-actions: Keyboard hint for the key to select an action in an item in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-keyhint-return: Keyboard hint for the key to return to search in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-keyhint-back: Keyboard hint for the Backspace key when it will pop the current drill-down level in a command palette mode (e.g., return to the parent category)
citizen-command-palette-keyhint-edit-tok: Keyboard hint for the Backspace key when it will unlock the currently selected token chip in the command palette input — the chip widget is removed and its raw source text is restored to the input so the user can edit it
citizen-command-palette-keyhint-select-t: Keyboard hint for the Backspace key when it will select the last token chip in the command palette input
citizen-command-palette-type-page: Label for the page type of the result in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-revision: Type label shown for revision results in the command palette history mode
citizen-command-palette-type-action: Label for the action type of the result in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-category: Label for the category type of the result in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-file: Label for the file type of the result in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-namespace: Label for the namespace type of the result in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-command: Label for the command type of the result in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-smw: Type label shown for Semantic MediaWiki query results in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-smw-categor: Type label for SMW category suggestions in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-smw-namespa: Type label for SMW namespace primitives (e.g. the Category entry-point) in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-smw-printou: Type label for SMW printout suggestions in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-smw-propert: Type label for SMW property suggestions in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-smw-value: Type label for SMW value suggestions in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-special-pag: Label for the special page type of the result in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-menu-item: Label for the menu item type of the result in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-type-user: Label for the user type of the result in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-command-action-d: Description for the action command in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-command-action-l: Label for the action command in the command palette command list.
citizen-command-palette-command-category: Description for the category command in the command palette command list. See {{msg-mw|Citizen-command-palette-command-category-label}}.
Label for the category command in the command palette command list.
citizen-command-palette-command-file-des: Description for the file/media mode in the command palette command list.
citizen-command-palette-command-file-lab: Label for the file/media mode in the command palette command list.
citizen-command-palette-detail-copy-acti: Tooltip and aria-label for the copy-to-clipboard button rendered in the detail panel header (e.g. next to a file's name).
citizen-command-palette-detail-copy-feed: Tooltip text shown for ~1.5s on the copy-to-clipboard button after a successful copy.
citizen-command-palette-command-help-des: Description for the help command in the command palette command list. Selecting it opens the in-palette help overlay.
citizen-command-palette-command-help-lab: Label for the help command in the command palette command list.
citizen-command-palette-command-history-: Description for the revision history mode in the command palette
Label for the revision history mode in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-command-ns-descr: Description for the namespace command in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-command-ns-label: Label for the namespace command in the command palette command list.
citizen-command-palette-command-smw-desc: Description for the Semantic MediaWiki command in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-command-smw-labe: Label for the Semantic MediaWiki command in the command palette.
citizen-command-palette-command-user-des: Description for the user command in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-command-user-lab: Label for the user command in the command palette command list.
citizen-command-palette-help-section-des: Section heading rendered in the command palette help overlay above the long-form mode description.
citizen-command-palette-help-section-mod: Section heading rendered in the command palette help overlay above the list of available modes.
citizen-command-palette-help-section-tri: Section heading rendered in the command palette help overlay above the list of trigger keys for the active mode.
citizen-command-palette-mode-action-desc: Long-form description of the action mode shown in the help overlay.
citizen-command-palette-mode-action-plac: Placeholder text shown in the command palette input when the action mode is active.
citizen-command-palette-mode-category-br: Root segment label rendered in the category mode breadcrumb (e.g. "Categories / Animals"). Shown at the start of the breadcrumb when no category has been drilled into.
citizen-command-palette-mode-category-de: Long-form description of the category mode shown in the help overlay, covering both root behaviour and drill-down.
citizen-command-palette-mode-category-em: Description shown in the category mode at the root level when the current page has no categories to surface. Directs the user to type to search instead. See {{msg-mw|Citizen-command-palette-mode-category-empty-title}}.
Title shown in the category mode at the root level when the current page has no categories to surface.
citizen-command-palette-mode-category-no: Description shown in the category mode when a search term returns no matching categories or pages. See {{msg-mw|Citizen-command-palette-mode-category-noresults-title}}.
Title shown in the category mode when a search term returns no matching categories or pages.
citizen-command-palette-mode-category-pl: Placeholder text shown in the command palette input when the category mode is active and no category has been drilled into.
citizen-command-palette-mode-file-descri: Long-form help description for the file/media mode shown in the help overlay; uses kbd markup for keys.
citizen-command-palette-mode-file-detail: Detail-panel label for the file's license short name (e.g. "CC BY-SA 4.0").
Detail-panel label for the file's dimensions and byte size (e.g. "1280 × 960, 412 KB").
Detail-panel label for when the file was uploaded and by whom (e.g. "2d · Bob").
citizen-command-palette-mode-file-empty-: Description shown in the file mode when no query has been entered.
Title shown in the file mode when no query has been entered.
citizen-command-palette-mode-file-noresu: Description shown in the file mode when a search term returns no matching files.
Title shown in the file mode when a search term returns no matching files.
citizen-command-palette-mode-file-placeh: Placeholder text shown in the command palette input when the file/media mode is active.
citizen-command-palette-mode-history-des:
Long-form help description for the revision history mode shown in the help overlay; uses kbd markup for keys.

The word View should be translated as in {{msg-mw|Citizen-command-palette-action-view}}.
citizen-command-palette-mode-history-emp: Description for the empty state when the user is not viewing a wiki page; tells them to open an article first
Title for the empty state when the user is not viewing a wiki page
citizen-command-palette-mode-history-no-: Placeholder text shown in place of an edit summary when the revision has none
citizen-command-palette-mode-history-nor: Description shown when the user's filter returns no matching revisions; suggests editing the filter
Title shown when the user's filter returns no matching revisions
citizen-command-palette-mode-history-pla: Input placeholder when the revision history mode is active
citizen-command-palette-mode-namespace-d: Long-form description of the namespace mode shown in the help overlay, covering the chip auto-tokenization behaviour.
citizen-command-palette-mode-ns-placehol: Placeholder text shown in the command palette input when the namespace mode is active.
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-empty-d: Description shown in the command palette SMW mode when no query has been entered, explaining the syntax
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-empty-t: Title shown in the command palette SMW mode when no query has been entered
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-malform: Description shown in the command palette SMW mode when the query is incomplete, hinting to close brackets
Title shown in the command palette SMW mode when the query is incomplete or malformed
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-nocateg: Description shown in the command palette SMW mode when category suggestions return no matches
Title shown in the command palette SMW mode when category suggestions return no matches
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-noprint: Description shown when no printout property suggestions are found in the SMW command palette mode
Title shown when no printout property suggestions are found in the SMW command palette mode
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-noprope: Description shown in the command palette SMW mode when property suggestions return no matches
Title shown in the command palette SMW mode when property suggestions return no matches
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-noresul: Description shown in the command palette SMW mode when a valid query returns no matching pages
Title shown in the command palette SMW mode when a valid query returns no results
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-descrip: Long-form description of the Semantic MediaWiki mode shown in the help overlay, illustrating how to chain Ask conditions.
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-novalue: Description shown in the command palette SMW mode when value suggestions return no matches
Title shown in the command palette SMW mode when value suggestions return no matches
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-placeho: Placeholder text shown in the command palette input when the Semantic MediaWiki mode is active
citizen-command-palette-mode-user-descri: Long-form description of the user mode shown in the help overlay, pointing at the per-result Talk and Contributions action buttons.
citizen-command-palette-mode-user-empty-: Description shown in the command palette user mode when no query has been entered
Title shown in the command palette user mode when no query has been entered
citizen-command-palette-mode-user-noresu: Description shown in the command palette user mode when the search returns no matching users
Title shown in the command palette user mode when the search returns no matching users
citizen-command-palette-mode-user-placeh: Placeholder text shown in the command palette input when the user search mode is active.
citizen-command-palette-queryaction-full: Description for the fulltext search in the command palette
citizen-command-palette-queryaction-page: Description for the page edit action in the command palette
citizen-config-preview: Description for the {{Help|Preview}} config option. Used in extension registration metadata.
citizen-config-usenewtoken: Description for the {{Help|UseNewToken}} config option. Used in extension registration metadata.
